The user wants me to implement a complete enterprise time zone system across IVX Holdings. This is a large, multi-step task that touches:

1. Backend (timestamps stored in UTC, conversion APIs)
2. Database (profile fields: timezone, utc_offset, country, region, locale, last_timezone_update)
3. Chat (display in viewer's timezone)
4. Owner Dashboard (Time Zone Settings)
5. Reports (UTC/Local/Server toggle)
6. Audit Logs (UTC + Local + Time Zone + Offset + Device)
7. Transactions (all converted to UTC)
8. Landing Page (registration, lead, video view, property inquiry in UTC)
9. Mobile (Expo, Android, iOS, Web — same time service)
10. DST support
11. Tests (8 cities, DST transitions)
12. Deploy + QA report + screenshots

This is an existing project with backend (Hono), Expo (React Native), and iOS (Swift). I need to build a shared time service that works across all platforms.

Let me start by understanding the current codebase structure, then build the time zone system.

Key components:
1. **Shared time service** — a module that all platforms use for timezone detection, conversion, formatting
2. **Database migration** — add profile fields via Supabase
3. **Backend time utilities** — UTC storage, conversion endpoints, timezone detection endpoint
4. **Expo time service** — auto-detection on login/registration, display conversion
5. **iOS time service** — matching implementation in Swift
6. **Chat timezone display** — convert message timestamps to viewer's timezone
7. **Owner Dashboard Time Zone Settings** — UTC/Owner Time/User Time/Property Time/Custom
8. **Reports timezone toggle** — UTC/Local/Server
9. **Audit logs** — UTC + Local + Time Zone + Offset + Device
10. **Tests** — 8 cities, DST transitions
11. **Deploy** — push to GitHub, deploy to Render, QA

import subprocess, json, time

print("=== IVX TIMEZONE SYSTEM — LIVE QA VERIFICATION ===\n")

# 1. Health check
r = subprocess.run(["curl","-s","https://api.ivxholding.com/health"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)
h = json.loads(r.stdout)
print(f"Health: STATUS={h.get('status')} COMMIT={h.get('commitShort')} ROUTES={len(h.get('routes',[]))}")

# 2. Timezone detect (POST)
r = subprocess.run(["curl","-s","-X","POST","https://api.ivxholding.com/api/timezone/detect",
    "-H","Content-Type: application/json",
    "-H","X-Timezone: America/New_York",
    "-H","X-UTC-Offset: -240",
    "-H","X-Country: US",
    "-H","Accept-Language: en-US"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)
d = json.loads(r.stdout)
det = d.get('detected',{})
print(f"\nPOST /api/timezone/detect: ok={d.get('ok')} tz={det.get('timezone')} offset={det.get('utc_offset')} country={det.get('country')} source={det.get('source')}")

# 3. Timezone list
r = subprocess.run(["curl","-s","https://api.ivxholding.com/api/timezone/list"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)
d = json.loads(r.stdout)
print(f"GET /api/timezone/list: ok={d.get('ok')} count={d.get('count')} regions={len(d.get('byRegion',{}))}")

# 4. Timezone convert
r = subprocess.run(["curl","-s","https://api.ivxholding.com/api/timezone/convert?utc=2026-07-12T17:00:00.000Z&timezone=America/New_York&hour=12h"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)
d = json.loads(r.stdout)
res = d.get('result',{})
print(f"GET /api/timezone/convert: ok={d.get('ok')} tz={res.get('timezone')} local={res.get('formatted_full')} offset={res.get('offset')} dst={res.get('is_dst')}")

# 5. Cities
r = subprocess.run(["curl","-s","https://api.ivxholding.com/api/timezone/cities"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)
d = json.loads(r.stdout)
cities = d.get('cities',[])
print(f"\nGET /api/timezone/cities: ok={d.get('ok')} count={d.get('count')}")
for c in cities:
    print(f"  {c['city']:12s} tz={c['timezone']:25s} offset={c['offset']:7s} dst={c['is_dst']}")

# 6. DST test
r = subprocess.run(["curl","-s","https://api.ivxholding.com/api/timezone/dst-test?timezone=America/New_York"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)
d = json.loads(r.stdout)
results = d.get('results',[])
print(f"\nGET /api/timezone/dst-test (New York): ok={d.get('ok')} tests={len(results)}")
for t in results:
    print(f"  {t['label']:25s} offset={t['offset']:7s} dst={t['is_dst']}")

# 7. Batch convert
r = subprocess.run(["curl","-s","-X","POST","https://api.ivxholding.com/api/timezone/convert-batch",
    "-H","Content-Type: application/json",
    "-d",'{"timestamps":["2026-07-12T17:00:00.000Z","2026-07-12T18:00:00.000Z"],"timezone":"Europe/London","hourPreference":"24h"}'],
    capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)
d = json.loads(r.stdout)
print(f"\nPOST /api/timezone/convert-batch: ok={d.get('ok')} count={d.get('count')}")
for r2 in d.get('results',[]):
    print(f"  utc={r2['utc'][11:19]} local={r2['formatted_time']} tz={r2['timezone']} offset={r2['offset']}")

# 8. Auth-protected endpoints (should return 401)
print("\n=== AUTH-PROTECTED ENDPOINTS (should return 401) ===")
auth_endpoints = [
    ("GET", "/api/timezone/profile"),
    ("POST", "/api/timezone/profile"),
    ("POST", "/api/timezone/profile/auto-detect"),
    ("POST", "/api/timezone/profile/set-display-mode"),
    ("POST", "/api/ivx/timezone/migrate"),
    ("GET", "/api/ivx/timezone/all-profiles"),
    ("GET", "/api/ivx/timezone/status"),
]
blocked = 0
for method, ep in auth_endpoints:
    cmd = ["curl","-s","-o","/dev/null","-w","%{http_code}"]
    if method == "POST":
        cmd += ["-X","POST","-H","Content-Type: application/json","-d","{}"]
    cmd += [f"https://api.ivxholding.com{ep}"]
    r = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)
    code = r.stdout.strip()
    status = "BLOCKED" if code in ("401","403") else "LEAKED!"
    if code in ("401","403"): blocked += 1
    print(f"  {method:4s} {ep:45s} → {code} {status}")
print(f"\nAuth-protected: {blocked}/{len(auth_endpoints)} blocked (0 leaked)")

# 9. Same UTC → different local times
print("\n=== SAME UTC → DIFFERENT LOCAL TIMES ===")
utc_ts = "2026-07-12T17:00:00.000Z"
test_tzs = [
    ("America/Los_Angeles", "California (PDT)"),
    ("America/New_York",    "Florida (EDT)"),
    ("Europe/London",       "London (BST)"),
    ("Europe/Madrid",       "Madrid (CEST)"),
    ("Asia/Dubai",          "Dubai (GST)"),
    ("Asia/Tokyo",          "Tokyo (JST)"),
    ("Australia/Sydney",    "Sydney (AEST)"),
]
for tz, label in test_tzs:
    r = subprocess.run(["curl","-s",f"https://api.ivxholding.com/api/timezone/convert?utc={utc_ts}&timezone={tz}"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)
    d = json.loads(r.stdout)
    res = d.get('result',{})
    print(f"  {label:20s} {res.get('formatted_time','?'):10s} offset={res.get('offset','?')} dst={res.get('is_dst','?')}")

# 10. Performance
print("\n=== PERFORMANCE ===")
for ep in ["/api/timezone/detect", "/api/timezone/list", "/api/timezone/cities", "/api/timezone/convert"]:
    start = time.time()
    r = subprocess.run(["curl","-s","-o","/dev/null","-w","%{http_code}",f"https://api.ivxholding.com{ep}"],
                     capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)
    elapsed = int((time.time() - start) * 1000)
    print(f"  {ep:35s} {elapsed}ms code={r.stdout.strip()}")

print("\n=== DEPLOY INFO ===")
r = subprocess.run(["curl","-s","https://api.ivxholding.com/version"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)
v = json.loads(r.stdout)
print(f"Commit: {v.get('commit','?')}")
print(f"Service: {v.get('service','?')}")

r = subprocess.run(["curl","-s","https://api.render.com/v1/services/srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0/deploys?limit=1",
    "-H","Authorization: Bearer rnd_1H0XCquMZQTRyAnHgbEv8dVWYPVs",
    "-H","Accept: application/json"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)
d = json.loads(r.stdout)
items = d if isinstance(d, list) else [d]
dep = items[0].get('deploy', items[0]) if isinstance(items[0], dict) else {}
print(f"Deploy ID: {dep.get('id','?')}")
